products.brochure_direction_en: Gentle-release adhesive for gentle removal and fragile-skin wear.
products.brochure_direction_zh: 温和移除胶黏剂,适合温和揭除与脆弱皮肤佩戴。
products.compliance_note_en: Biocompatibility information comes from the adhesive supplier's ISO 10993 (or similar) testing, some using a similar source adhesive. Suggested wear time is not a guarantee for every product or user.
products.compliance_note_zh: 生物相容性信息来自胶黏剂供应商依 ISO 10993 或类似方法的测试,部分使用相似源胶黏剂;建议佩戴时间不构成对所有产品与使用者的保证。
products.source_document: FLEXcon Healthcare (DermaFlex / Omni-Wave / PharmCal / MedFlex) + CN BIO TECH brochures (2024)

products.brochure_direction_en: Conductive transfer adhesive for ECG, sEMG, EDA electrodes, biosensing and TENS stimulation. Specific constructions to be confirmed.
products.brochure_direction_zh: 导电胶转移材料,用于 ECG、sEMG、EDA 电极、生物传感与 TENS 刺激。具体结构待确认。
products.compliance_note_en: Omni-Wave is a conductive transfer adhesive material, described separately from ordinary printable label materials.
products.compliance_note_zh: Omni-Wave 为导电胶转移材料,与普通可印刷标签材料分开说明。
products.source_document: FLEXcon Healthcare (DermaFlex / Omni-Wave / PharmCal / MedFlex) + CN BIO TECH brochures (2024)

products.brochure_direction_en: Pharmaceutical container labelling — small/large-diameter vials, cover labels, tamper-evident and security identification. Specific constructions to be confirmed.

products.product_name: FLEXcon PharmCal Blood-Bag & Cold-Chain Label Material
products.brochure_direction_en: Blood-bag, plasma-bag and cold-chain pharmaceutical labelling. (Blood bags: Pharmaceutical application, Low-Temperature requirement — not Packaging & Security.)
products.brochure_direction_zh: 血袋、血浆袋及冷链药品标识。(血袋:归“医药与制药”应用、“低温与冷冻存储”工况,不入“药品包装与安全”。)
products.source_document: FLEXcon Healthcare (DermaFlex / Omni-Wave / PharmCal / MedFlex) + CN BIO TECH brochures (2024)

products.compliance_note_en: UL, IEC and FDA-related statements apply only to the specific series and part numbers listed by the manufacturer — not to all medical materials.
products.compliance_note_zh: UL、IEC 与 FDA 相关表述仅适用于原厂列明的具体系列与料号,不扩大到全部医疗材料。
